name: GOLFTEC Manhattan
about: GOLFTEC is a technology-driven golf instruction and club fitting center. The core offering is data-based golf lessons using OPTIMOTION motion measurement technology, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide precise feedback. Instruction is delivered through personalized lesson journeys, starting with a Swing Evaluation that creates a custom game plan. The service model also includes expert club fitting, aiming to optimize equipment with an average of 21 additional yards off the tee. The environment is designed for focused improvement, featuring indoor bays equipped with advanced technology for both lessons and practice sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven feedback using advanced motion measurement and launch monitor technology
Personalized improvement plans created by certified PGA coaches
Comprehensive services including both lessons and professional club fitting

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs. For club fittings, GOLFTEC provides a wide range of demo equipment from top brands to find the perfect fit for you.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a policy on outside food and drinks. It does mention a pro shop that offers a 10% discount on golf gear, but no details on in-house food or beverage service.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide information on simulator play time. The service is structured around lessons, practice sessions, and club fittings rather than traditional 18-hole simulator rounds.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly or suitable for youth lessons?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC is suitable for youth. The content mentions services for juniors and that their technology is designed to help players of all skill levels, including beginners.
